scripts.nuke: find . -name 'node_modules' -not -path '*/.git/*' -prune -exec rm -rf {} + ; find . -name 'dist' -not -path '*/.git/*' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -prune -exec rm -rf {} + ; find . -name 'target' -not -path '*/.git/*' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -prune -exec rm -rf {} + ; rm -rf .turbo
scripts.fresh: pnpm nuke && pnpm install && pnpm build
